"""Synthetic flow report fixture with legacy-style section headers."""

Executive Summary
- Index positioning skewed bullish on delta
- Single-name flow concentrated in mega-cap tech

SPY net delta +$1.2B; QQQ net delta +$850M

AAPL and NVDA lead call buying; TSLA mixed

Technology 42%

Energy 9%

SPY    1200       88

SPY    450        75
